description: freshness validator: MODEL files must be at least as new (newest git commit) as the SURFACE files they track; a stale model fails the gate (read-only)
rules: the gate IS the exit code: 0 iff the model is current, 1 if the surface changed after it
usage: Set PROJECT_DIR (+ optional MODEL_GLOB [default *.blueprint.json], SURFACE_GLOB [default infra/govern]). The H0 rule: self-blueprints must be >= the last enforcement-surface commit. Output: gate.json.
limitation: Compares newest-commit timestamps only - not semantic staleness; both globs are git pathspecs over tracked files.
